name: Scones
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in the butter until pea-sized particles remain.
3. In a separate bowl, beat 2 eggs and reserve about 2 tablespoons for 12 scones.
4. Mix in the half-and-half with the reserved beaten eggs.
5. Stir in the mixture to the dry ingredients.
6. Pat dough onto a floured board to a thickness of 1/2 to 3/4".
7. Cut the dough into 2-inch biscuits.
8. Place on an ungreased baking sheet and brush with reserved beaten egg.
9. Bake for about 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly golden on top.
